{{Quote|Nobody told us the Emperor had a private zoo!|Anonymous Rebel trooper|<ref name="DE II 5">[[Dark Empire II 5|''Dark Empire II'' 5]]</ref>}}
The '''chrysalide''', also known as the '''chrysalis beast''', was a creature [[Mutant|altered]] by [[Sith alchemy/Legends|Sith alchemy]].

==History==
[[File:Chrysalide-FF73.png|thumb|left|180px|A chrysalis rancor]]
It was widely believed that during ancient times, the knowledge of creating the chrysalis beast was formed by the ancient [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith]] [[Species/Legends|race]]. In those early years, the creatures served the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] as pets or protectors to high-ranking officers or powerful [[Noble/Legends|nobles]]. The knowledge for creating such monsters was later encoded within [[Holocron/Legends|holocrons]] and other such tomes, which were buried on Sith [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] such as [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]. Many believed that the knowledge of creating such fearsome beasts was lost.<ref name="JATM">''[[Jedi Academy Training Manual]]''</ref>

However, research by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] uncovered the process of creating chrysalis beasts. Using immense alchemical cocoons, he later employed this process to transform [[Rancor/Legends|rancors]] into chrysalides and used them as pets at the [[Emperor's Citadel|Imperial Citadel]] on [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].<ref name="JATM" /> [[X-1 Viper]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] controlled by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] attacked Imperial forces at the Emperor's Citadel and had them all but defeated until the chrysalides were released on the droids. The chrysalides' teeth could chew through Vipers' armor, and the droids proved no match for the chrysalides. They turned the battle in the Empire's favor and caused the surviving New Republic personnel to retreat. Chrysalides would attack anything in sight apart from other Chrysalides, and would almost always prioritize the largest available target. Other creatures mutated into chrysalis beasts were [[Gundark/Legends|gundarks]], [[Katarn/Legends|katarns]], and [[vornskr]]s.

==Behind the scenes==
The chrysalis beasts were introduced in ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II]]''.<ref name="DE II">''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II]]''</ref>
